TEMPLATE_021926_Regional_Spotlight.name: TEMPLATE_021926_Regional_Spotlight
TEMPLATE_021926_Regional_Spotlight.description: This has a white body block at the top with an H1 and subheader in a column on the left, with a picture of a Dot face on the right, and then a CTA button beneath those. Outside of the white section then comes the main body of the content, then again with a button CTA at the bottom of it.

TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_NoH1.name: TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_NoH1
TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_NoH1.description: A simple template with a white body email and light gray background, with a bnaner at the top, no h1, just content beneath it assuming the H1 is text in the image. A button CTA at the bottom.

TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_BottomContent.name: TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_BottomContent
TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_BottomContent.description: A template with a white body email and light gray background, with a bnaner at the top, h1, subheader underneath in a paragraph, and then a CTA button underneath. Underneath the white section top is the main content, with an additional CTA button, and a signoff underneath it in a paragraph.

TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_H1.name: TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_H1
TEMPLATE_021926_TopBanner_H1.description: A template with a white body email and light gray background, with a bnaner at the top, h1, content underneath in a paragraph, and then a CTA button underneath.

TEMPLATE_022226_Marketing_Newsletter.name: TEMPLATE_022226_Marketing_Newsletter
TEMPLATE_022226_Marketing_Newsletter.description: A template with a white body email. It contains an H1 and subheader, with a first section of a Title, Space image on the left and details on the right, with a cta button below. Then two sections of banners, h2s, paragraphs, and ctas.
